# Repository-owned media

`ynx-owned-test.mp4` was generated locally for this repository with FFmpeg from
a solid Klein-blue color source and a synthetic 642 Hz sine wave. It contains no
third-party footage, music, artwork, likeness or trademark. It may be used only
for YNX Video processing tests.

SHA-256: `be414db1d01558b11c7592b7d4dc69d0fee8da158997dc477e2fdaf6b9e3ee39`
